name: Arcus Biosciences, Inc.
business: Arcus Biosciences is a late clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing differentiated molecules for patients with cancer and inflammatory and autoimmune diseases.
sellsTo: patients with inflammatory and autoimmune diseases

exposures.sentence: We are a late clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing differentiated molecules for patients with cancer and inflammatory and autoimmune diseases.

catalysts.sentence: This study has a primary endpoint of PFS and is currently enrolling.
This study completed enrollment in September 2025, less than 12 months after study initiation, and we expect results from this study in the first half of 2027.
A futility analysis is expected to be conducted for this study in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: STAR-221 Phase 3 discontinued due to futility in December 2025
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we announced that our Phase 3 STAR-221 clinical trial, which evaluated domvanalimab in combination with zimberelimab and chemotherapy in first-line metastatic GI cancers, is being discontinued due to futility.

catalysts.event: Initiation of first study for MRGPRX2 inhibitor in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to initiate our first study for our MRGPRX2 inhibitor in 2026 in healthy volunteers to identify the optimal dosing for our molecule.

catalysts.event: IND filing for TNF inhibitor expected late 2026 or early 2027
catalysts.sentence: We expect to identify our lead development candidate for this program in early 2026 and to file an IND for this molecule in late 2026 or early 2027.

catalysts.event: Phase 3 PEAK-1 study for casdatifan and cabozantinib in ccRCC
catalysts.sentence: Our first Phase 3 clinical trial, PEAK-1, is evaluating casdatifan and cabozantinib in ccRCC patients that have received prior immunotherapy, which we believe has a potential global peak sales opportunity of greater than $2 billion.

catalysts.event: Target initiation of second Phase 3 for casdatifan by end of 2026
catalysts.sentence: This Phase 3 study, which we are targeting initiation of by the end of 2026, will be informed by emerging data from the following ongoing cohorts and studies:

tamClaims.claim: Potential global peak sales opportunity greater than $2 billion for casdatifan plus cabozantinib in ccRCC after immunotherapy
tamClaims.sentence: Our first Phase 3 clinical trial, PEAK-1, is evaluating casdatifan and cabozantinib in ccRCC patients that have received prior immunotherapy, which we believe has a potential global peak sales opportunity of greater than $2 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Potential global peak sales opportunity greater than $3 billion for casdatifan in a TKI-free regimen for first-line ccRCC
tamClaims.sentence: Our second Phase 3 clinical trial is expected to evaluate casdatifan in a Tyrosine Kinase Inhibitor ("TKI")-free regimen for the treatment of first-line ccRCC, which we believe represents a potential global peak sales opportunity of greater than $3 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Multi-billion dollar sales opportunities for chronic spontaneous urticaria and atopic dermatitis
tamClaims.sentence: Both CSU and atopic dermatitis represent multi-billion dollar sales opportunities.
